name: @pryzm/family-loader
description: PRYZM 2 — main-editor family loader (S56 D1).  loadFamily(path) opens a .pryzm-family ZIP via @pryzm/file-format, validates the manifest+document, runs a resolver pre-flight via @pryzm/family-runtime, and caches the loaded family by (familyId, schemaHash).  Pure-Node — used by the editor host, the bake-worker, and the AI worker.
